positive: A mesmerizing celestial forest scene, dominated by bioluminescent flora and root systems. The central subject is a gentle, stylized deer silhouette drinking from a crystal-clear pond. The surrounding trees exhibit glowing, exaggerated fern fronds and mushroom cap clusters, creating a depth of field effect. Use a strong, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, vibrant teal, electric sapphire blue, and luminous lime green for the bioluminescence. The style should be intricate, magical realism combined with elegant line art, suitable for a central, highly impactful apparel print. Composition must feature strong symmetry and a clear focal point on the deer and the glowing elements. Studio lighting setup, vector illustration quality, clean edges, perfect composition, isolated on a clean background (optional: subtle, distressed paper texture).
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, low quality, poor anatomy, noisy, extra limbs, bad perspective, cropped, logos, trademarks, copyrighted, graffiti, photo, hyperrealism
